text: The world seems distant and tense in these dimly-lit corridors, as though I am wandering on the edge of a revelation or an encounter. The quiet, empty spaces fill me with anticipation—a certain solemnity, mixed with curiosity. I feel the intellectual thrum of inquiry from the second image, the R+D wall, yet the darkness leaves me questioning what is left unseen. I am both observer and participant, alert and contemplative, suspended in wait for meaning to emerge.
